name: GPU Memory Triage
summary: Distinguish GPU allocation, framework, and model memory failures.
description: This skill collects read-only evidence for GPU memory failures, including scheduler GPU allocation, device memory visibility, framework memory summaries, and common out-of-memory log signals.

inputs.name: log_file
inputs.description: Training or job log to scan for GPU memory signals.

inputs.name: gpu_partition
inputs.description: Optional Slurm partition or queue that provides GPU nodes.

inputs.name: framework_environment
inputs.description: Module, virtual environment, Conda environment, or container that provides the ML framework.

outputs.name: gpu_memory_report
outputs.description: Device visibility, memory totals, framework memory summary, and log clues.

outputs.name: triage_next_actions
outputs.description: Likely next checks for allocation, data-loader, model, batch-size, precision, or fragmentation issues.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run on a short GPU allocation and scan a failed training log to confirm the report distinguishes allocation visibility from framework memory errors.
